channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Judge Rejects RICO Claims in Lawsuit Over Pastor-Led Crypto Ponzi Scheme
item.description: Eddy Alexandre, who pleaded guilty to commodities fraud in 2023, is currently serving out a nine-year prison sentence

item.title: Wall Street pushes tokenized stocks, but institutions aren’t eager to trade them
item.description: Exchanges are racing toward blockchain-based equities and 24/7 trading. Institutions, however, fear liquidity and funding risks.

item.title: Brazil industry giants representing 850 companies decry stablecoin tax threat
item.description: They argue the tax would be illegal, violating Brazil's Constitution and Virtual Assets Law, as stablecoins are not considered fiat currency.

item.title: Bitcoin Hit a Major Milestone—Most Miners Won't Be Around for the Next One
item.description: Twenty million Bitcoin mined. One million left. The miners who got us here might not be around for the finish.

item.title: The math behind Strategy’s path to 1 million bitcoin by the end of 2026
item.description: The largest publicly traded corporate holder of bitcoin would need to buy roughly 6,158 BTC per week, about $523 million, to reach the milestone by Dec. 31.

item.title: AI developers may not be keen on crypto, but stablecoins are the secret to agentic finance, crypto insiders say
item.description: The brave new world of autonomous, micro-transacting AI agents is where programmable cryptocurrencies will shine, according to stablecoin experts.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Balaji calls for more ‘crypto tools’ for refugees amid Middle East tensions
item.description: Former Coinbase CTO says the crypto industry should build more financial tools for refugees and stateless people as conflicts and migration increase worldwide.

item.title: Crypto can fight money laundering without stifling financial freedom
item.description: Blockchain's transparency traces illicit flows better than fiat systems. Industry-wide information sharing and unified AML rules close gaps, without curbing liberty.

item.title: USDC market cap nears record $80B amid ‘capital flight’ in UAE: Analyst
item.description: USDC’s market cap is approaching a record $80 billion, with one analyst linking the surge to capital flight and turmoil in Dubai’s real estate market.

item.title: Whale Selling $AAVE? Blockchain Capital deposited their remaining 216,292 $AAVE($24.8M) into Coinbase Prime. Meanwhile, whale 0xFF5D withdrew 10,008 $AAVE($1.15M) from Aave and deposited it to #Binance. intel.arkm.com/explorer/entit… intel.ark - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1ObXFkM1M5blVRT2NxZHFjMlpyMUxPVzd5VkZDbFpibVVhMHVGNVdJNGpqVzh2d0hHX3BMU05fUl80M1JUYkJieERBak5Gakg4M056dVRpNUJoWkR2UUNhMzln?oc=5" target="_blank">Whale Selling $AAVE? Blockchain Ca…

item.title: We should build more crypto tools for refugees and stateless people. Because there may unfortunately be many more refugees and stateless people…and from all social classes. Ukrainians leaving the war. Californians leaving the state. Gulf workers leaving t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTFA2Sl9JeWFZTmhuQnB4STFUMmdlTkI3VVFBV3VGeHhZM19DNnVhWmNNd251aVlaWW45UVU2c2xfajBSVl9DOGZ5UXlFWmxjR0kxcUlPVjg4Q3VSOWRX?oc=5" target="_blank">We should build more crypto tools for refu…

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs extend inflow streak to five days for first time in 2026
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs brought in about $767 million over five straight days of inflows for the first time so far this year.

item.title: Bitcoin holds $71,000 despite Trump warning of strikes on Iran's oil-rich Kharg Island
item.description: The largest cryptocurrency is up 4.2% on the week despite Friday's reversal, with attention now turning to the Fed meeting on March 17-18 and whether oil above $100 forces a shift in rate expectations.

item.title: BlackRock says 'exotic' crypto ETFs not part of its strategy
item.description: BlackRock launched a staked Ether exchange-traded fund on Thursday, expanding its crypto offerings beyond its flagship spot Bitcoin and Ether ETFs that launched in 2024.

item.title: Bitcoin can survive 72% of the world's submarine cables being cut, but a targeted attack on five hosting providers could cripple it
item.description: A Cambridge study spanning 11 years and 68 verified cable failures found that Bitcoin's physical infrastructure is far more resilient than previously understood, with TOR adoption actually strengthening the network.

item.title: Grayscale(Ethereum Mini Trust) staked 57,600 $ETH($121.6M) 5 hours ago. intel.arkm.com/explorer/entit… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAzWGNtNFJFekpqSjZZSHo2bW9EMmEydnBwWl9EdEFkaWtCQ0E1aU5UMzRjMmJGbWNxbmNrOWtlbzBuV29zS05qT0JBeU1IQXBMVnZDSmY0Z09YeklZeEdEY2ZB?oc=5" target="_blank">Grayscale(Ethereum Mini Trust) sta…

item.title: Stablecoins could form backbone of global payments in 10 years: Billionaire
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller said stablecoins are more efficient, faster and cheaper than fiat running on traditional banking infrastructure.

item.title: Bitcoin nearly overtakes $74K, as data suggests bear market is not over
item.description: Bitcoin showed remarkable strength throughout the week, but BTC’s correlation to tech stocks and its reactive spot ETF flows suggest the bear market isn’t over yet.

item.title: Federal court ends Custodia Bank's legal bid for a master account
item.description: One judge sided with Custodia Bank, stating that a master account is “indispensable” for a bank’s day-to-day operations and being denied one is “akin to a death sentence.”

item.title: A huge gap between network use and token value is the most important thing happening in XRP right now
item.description: Daily payments on XRPL surged to 2.7 million, AMM pools exploded to 27,000, and tokenized asset value jumped 35% in 30 days. XRP is down 26% this year.

item.title: 💥 The #Bitcoin Fear and Greed Index is still in "Extreme Fear" 👀 Buying dips at this level is where legends are made! 🙌 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBzSHllQzNrdjFIWXhwcVFOVkRLRkVlWXRpZEJmX0drNmNuMHlDQktaNmRLdEVNMTRhdlFEaXhWUlVFTDlUWGd6elhYaWdsb3FMWFFGRzBaMVlHWmd0R2xhLVRIYXNNSzg?oc=5" target="_blank">💥 The #Bitcoin Fear and Gr…

item.title: Court closes Custodia fight with Federal Reserve just as Fed opens master-account door
item.description: Just days after the Federal Reserve granted a limited master account to Kraken, crypto bank Custodia's years-long court battle with the Fed concludes in a loss.

item.title: BPI targets August for BTC tax relief, but warns time is running out
item.description: The Bitcoin Policy Institute said the bipartisan support for a de minimis tax exemption for smaller Bitcoin transactions is "encouraging."

item.title: Circle‘s USDC overtook Tether‘s USDT in adjusted YTD volume: Mizuho
item.description: Analysts at the investment company said the change was significant because the stablecoin “winner” will be the one people use for everyday transactions.

item.title: Bitcoin is not a Ponzi scheme. A Ponzi requires a central operator promising returns and paying early investors with funds from later ones. Bitcoin has no issuer, no promoter, and no guaranteed return—just an open, decentralized monetary network driven by c - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5BMFZzUWZYVTZORUFXc3BHZ2VILUppRXpKZzR5b09IbHU4Vm5DaUJLTUNabGk4dExzd3p2T3lhbFZlNHRseGpnVDFrNWNlS1lnRnN6V2tIaFItd1k?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin is not a Ponzi scheme. A Ponzi requ…

item.title: Ether accumulation data predicts rally to $2.8K, but there’s a catch
item.description: Ether bulls appear to be targeting $2,800 as their next stop, but ETH futures data shows a divided market with limited odds for a sustained 33% rally.

item.title: 🚨 ALERT: Etherscan warns that address poisoning attacks on Ethereum are becoming increasingly automated and widespread, aiming to trick users into sending funds to lookalike addresses. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBDY2JzS1hDVTFqVnBwZ3cyTEZxQnFjUGJRdXhIRXF6Y2xsUzZzcExHLU4wRVRrQVVXS1pKYU9PYUQwWTY2MmtCU1NyR0d1TU5fVjZrTFRHelhoeUFqZ19NTFRTejU?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 ALERT: Etherscan warns that …

item.title: Crypto Biz: Circle stock defies Wall Street and digital asset selloff
item.description: The USDC issuer's stock is soaring despite a market selloff as stablecoins expand into traditional finance. Meanwhile, Canaan boosts BTC reserves and Wells Fargo eyes crypto services.

item.title: Circle overtakes BlackRock in tokenized Treasuries as market hits record $11 billion
item.description: Circle’s USYC tokenized U.S. Treasury fund has grown to $2.2 billion, surpassing BlackRock’s BUIDL fund as investors increasingly seek onchain yield and collateral.

item.title: TRON has joined the @Mastercard Crypto Partner Program reflecting a shared belief that the next phase of onchain payments will be built through collaboration. As digital assets move toward real-world use, connecting blockchain infrastructure with existing p - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9lenhCbURGOVc0RkZNd2JqQUFCMDlYVGlxVW5ncmpDa09IalpGZ2VFb2J2eWtMWHFTY3JlcUJjS3RIbDNtYlpIYW9mR3BkSWc1ZkRoTHJVMURCTlJf?oc=5" target="_blank">TRON has joined the @Mastercard Crypto Par…

item.title: FBI Investigating After Malware Found Lurking in Steam PC Games
item.description: Feds are looking to hear from victims after several games on Valve’s Steam platform were found to be distributing malicious software.

item.title: Key Bitcoin price levels to watch as BTC nears new monthly highs
item.description: Bitcoin is on track for its strongest weekly return since its 2025 rally to new highs. Analysts highlight the price levels BTC must reach to sustain its current bullish momentum.

item.title: Trump Meme Coin Price, Trading Volume Skyrocket as Holders Vie for Exclusive Event Access
item.description: President Donald Trump's meme coin has surged by 35%, with top holders stacking Solana-based tokens to earn access to an exclusive event.

item.title: Kraken-Linked SPAC Could Target Crypto Firm Valued at Up to $10 Billion
item.description: The company is taking a broad look at crypto-native firms that could generate interest on Wall Street.

item.title: Price predictions 3/13: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, XMR
item.description: Bitcoin faced strong resistance at the $74,500 level, but the shallow price pullback could set the stage for a stronger breakout in BTC and altcoins.

item.title: Billionaire Investor Stanley Druckenmiller Bullish on Stablecoin Growth
item.description: Former hedge fund manager Stanley Druckenmiller expects stablecoins to take over payments systems in the next 10-15 years.

item.title: I've long suspected Bitcoin is a giant Ponzi scheme and now I'm hearing tales of woe that make me fear I'm right. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5SbGZUOHAxZGFkTWNkaGJXbzZZZEdzdkdaVU5NU0RiVWdzeUlEeG5rYl9BN0JrYV9WNlFHYmxieDNBTFZTLURIQjJ4dGk4eHkwZl9xLUpUVmZXYk41eDN5N0RFcw?oc=5" target="_blank">I've long suspected Bitcoin is a…

item.title: 'Gold is not a store of value anymore' — Mike McGlone predicts a 2008-like setup
item.description: According to the Bloomberg Intelligence strategist, the oil shock and rising volatility across commodities and crypto may foreshadow a broader correction in equities.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation publishes mandate clarifying role and goals
item.description: The non-profit organization said the goal is to make Ethereum so decentralized that it could function even if the foundation ceases to exist.

item.title: Arthur Hayes: Strong Revenue and Real Trading Could Send HYPE to $150
item.description: Hayes said Hyperliquid’s strong revenue, real trading activity and disciplined token supply could push the token to new highs.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin supply on exchanges are heading towards new lows! 👀 Bullish! 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1ncGhSUi1ZWnlHOWJObW9Jb2E5WDN4R3JoZnREcEg4TUtHck90WnRDRWFIVlFCb21pTmlncF9CWUNmMnpTSXlGX3pCa2w3dDNfY3hBMC02QndyWW02SU1oWkROeGZvWTA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin supply on …

item.title: Ethereum accumulation wallets jump 30%: Will ETH price follow?
item.description: Ether’s road to recovery looked clearer, especially if the balance in Ethereum accumulation wallets and the staked supply continue rising at their current pace.

item.title: KuCoin launches perpetual futures tracking Tesla and Strategy stocks
item.description: The USDt-settled contracts allow traders to speculate on the price movements of the two companies’ shares around the clock without owning the underlying stocks.

item.title: US Treasury Sanctions Alleged $800 Million North Korean IT Worker Fraud Operation
item.description: Six North Korean individuals and two entities were hit with U.S. sanctions over an alleged crypto-fueled fraud scheme targeting U.S. firms.

item.title: Bitcoin quickly drops 3.5% as fresh Iran escalation short-circuits crypto rally
item.description: Surging to a near one-month high of $74,000, bitcoin reversed back to just above $71,000 as news of U.S. military movements in the Middle East rattled risk assets.

item.title: One mysterious investor made $2.5 million profit in hours by betting big on the latest Trump gala news
item.description: A dormant crypto whale just bet $7 million on the Trump memecoin after a new Mar-a-Lago gala was announced, sparking a 60% rally for the struggling token.

item.title: MoonPay introduces Ledger-secured AI crypto agents to address wallet key risks
item.description: The feature allows users to verify and sign every transaction generated by an AI agent using a Ledger hardware device, ensuring private keys never leave the hardware signer.

item.title: PIP Labs Sheds Staff as Story Protocol Leans Into AI
item.description: The team behind Story Protocol has let go of several employees and contractors as it explores opportunities associated with AI agents.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation publishes new mandate defining its role, core principles
item.description: The document comes at a point of transition for the organization, following shifts in the blockchain's technical roadmap and the resignation of a co-executive director.

item.title: Bitcoin miners saw the AI power crunch coming — and the nuclear revival
item.description: AI-driven data center demand is reviving nuclear power across the US, and Bitcoin miners were among the first to tap nuclear energy to run high-performance computing operations.

item.title: Stablecoins, bitcoin could reshape finance, Stanley Druckenmiller says
item.description: The billionaire investor said stablecoins could become the whole payment system in 10-15 years, and reiterated that crypto might replace the U.S. dollar as the global reserve currency.

item.title: Circle's USDC volumes top Tether's USDT for first time since 2019, prompting sell-side price target hike
item.description: Japanese investment bank Mizuho remains neutral on Circle, but lifted it price target to $120 from $100.

item.title: This is the new EF Mandate. For many of you, the contents should be no surprise, and a clarification along the lines that we have been going and thinking for the past few months. But the clarification is nevertheless worth making. Ethereum is a unique object a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9aeFc4VG1tejU3Q2JITWlJbTFQT2szQ2VCSy00al9oWl9yQ244cXE1VlZwek9mX3FmMmlJWWxhZHdHRUtkcnFjOExVWVFiMmFqcFYxeGdtVHBlcHg2aVpYNmdGSXNwUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">This is the new EF Mandate. …

item.title: Dubai’s Token2049, TON Crypto Conferences Canceled as Iran Conflict Rages On
item.description: A pair of planned Dubai conferences, Token2049 and TON Connect, have been pulled from the calendar amid Middle East unrest.

item.title: Trump Meme Coin, Render and Pi See Double-Digit Rallies as Bitcoin Rises
item.description: As Bitcoin consolidates, select altcoins like Trump, Pi, and Render surge on specific catalysts and improving risk appetite.

item.title: Bitcoin rises to one-month high of $73,800, continuing to outperform since start of Iran war
item.description: Falling oil prices are helping, but a bounce seemed in the cards after some of the worst sentiment in bitcoin's history.

item.title: U.S. sanctions 6 people, 2 companies that laundered $800 million in crypto for North Korea
item.description: The Treasury Department said North Korea infiltrated IT workers into U.S. businesses and channeled their wages back to the country to fund weapons of mass destruction programs.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $73,000 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAxc3lqQ2wxUVllNl8tR1VtQ3pjcVZYVk01UWl0MVFvRUVaM2owZjcxWTVJUXRyY0VHdnA5a1VkRU5MQUlOMDhEbFM2Y3VoS0tWZW8xR3RQVUxRMzFtWmUxbHNB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin reclaims $73,000<…

item.title: 🔥 BULLISH: BlackRock says Bitcoin ETF investors are long-term holders, with 90% accumulating despite the bear market. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE95QVpnR2hVbHdXOW1XNV8wSXZEeE9yR25wb2RReGpNUURnM2pnc1plSFJMZ1VKXzRRVUZSSlFqcE9qOVBkaXprSGxHYjIzcXEtZmFVbWQ4UTM3N095RjlSOXhXREs?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BULLISH: BlackRock says Bitc…
